name: @openvole/paw-browser
description: Browser automation Paw using Puppeteer for web browsing, interaction, and screenshots

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL in the browser. Returns the page URL and title after loading.

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click an element on the page by CSS selector. Waits for the element and any triggered navigation.

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into an input element identified by CSS selector.

tools.name: browser_screenshot
tools.description: Take a full-page screenshot of the current page. Returns a base64-encoded PNG.

tools.name: browser_content
tools.description: Get the page text content and a simplified accessibility tree of interactive elements (links, buttons, inputs).

tools.name: browser_evaluate
tools.description: Run arbitrary JavaScript in the page context and return the result.
